HC-SR04_Multiple.ino.functionality: measures distance using multiple HC-SR04 sensors and prints the values to the serial port

HC-SR04_Simple.ino.functionality: measures distance using the HC-SR04 sensor and prints the value to the serial port

HC-SR04_Temperature.ino.functionality: measures distance using the HC-SR04 sensor and prints the value to the serial port

HC-SR04_Time.ino.functionality: measures the distance using the HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor and prints the measured time in microseconds to the serial port

HC-SR04_Units.ino.functionality: measures and prints distances in different units: microseconds, millimeters, centimeters, and inches
